description.value:
You loosen your grip on the borrowed strength and try to hand it back. Attempt a Will save against the Release DC (your Release DC).

  • Critical Success Clean release; the discipline feeds the Climb (+2).
  • Success Clean release (+1 to the Climb).
  • Failure The Ansu doesn't let go. Lingering: the boons stay on and the Ansu steers. Re-save at the end of each of your turns.
  • Critical Failure Seizure: the Ansu takes the body for 1 round (the GM plays you), then Lingering resumes.
